'''âb-j-h''' ('''bajaha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:answere|answere]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-j-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:answere|answere]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âb-j-h
|-
! Lemma
| bajaha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bajahithi|bajahithi]] || [[word:bajahiji|bajahiji]] || [[word:bajahishi|bajahishi]] || [[word:bajahi|bajahi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:bajahuthuth|bajahuthuth]] || [[word:bajahujuj|bajahujuj]] || [[word:bajahushush|bajahushush]] || [[word:bajah|bajah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:bajahuthu|bajahuthu]] || [[word:bajahuju|bajahuju]] || [[word:bajahushu|bajahushu]] || [[word:bajahu|bajahu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:bajahufuth|bajahufuth]] || [[word:bajahufuj|bajahufuj]] || [[word:bajahufush|bajahufush]] || [[word:bajahuf|bajahuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:bajahethe|bajahethe]] || [[word:bajaheje|bajaheje]] || [[word:bajaheshe|bajaheshe]] || [[word:bajahe|bajahe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:bajahothoth|bajahothoth]] || [[word:bajahojoj|bajahojoj]] || [[word:bajahoshosh|bajahoshosh]] || [[word:bajah|bajah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:bajahotho|bajahotho]] || [[word:bajahojo|bajahojo]] || [[word:bajahosho|bajahosho]] || [[word:bajaho|bajaho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:bajahofoth|bajahofoth]] || [[word:bajahofoj|bajahofoj]] || [[word:bajahofosh|bajahofosh]] || [[word:bajahof|bajahof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:bajahĂŠthĂŠ|bajahĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:bajahĂŠjĂŠ|bajahĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:bajahĂŠshĂŠ|bajahĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:bajahĂŠ|bajahĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:bajahathath|bajahathath]] || [[word:bajahajaj|bajahajaj]] || [[word:bajahashash|bajahashash]] || [[word:bajah|bajah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:bajahatha|bajahatha]] || [[word:bajahaja|bajahaja]] || [[word:bajahasha|bajahasha]] || [[word:bajaha|bajaha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:bajahafath|bajahafath]] || [[word:bajahafaj|bajahafaj]] || [[word:bajahafash|bajahafash]] || [[word:bajahaf|bajahaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:bajahasha|bajahasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gobajahasha|gobajahasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokibajahasha|gokibajahasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:bajahnĂŒsha|bajahnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gobajahnknĂŒsha|gobajahnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokibajahnĂŒsha|gokibajahnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:bajahshĂ«sha|bajahshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobajahnkshĂ«sha|gobajahnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibajahshĂ«sha|gokibajahshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bajahrosha|bajahrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobajahnkrosha|gobajahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibajahrosha|gokibajahrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bajahmusha|bajahmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gobajahnkmusha|gobajahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibajahmusha|gokibajahmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:bajahsherasha|bajahsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gobajahnksherasha|gobajahnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokibajahsherasha|gokibajahsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:bajahngasha|bajahngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gobajahnkngasha|gobajahnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokibajahngasha|gokibajahngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bajahyasha|bajahyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gobajahnkyasha|gobajahnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokibajahyasha|gokibajahyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:bajahyamasha|bajahyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gobajahnkyamasha|gobajahnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokibajahyamasha|gokibajahyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:bajahnĂŒshĂ«sha|bajahnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gobajahnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gobajahnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokibajahnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokibajahnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:bajahnĂŒrosha|bajahnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobajahnknĂŒrosha|gobajahnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibajahnĂŒrosha|gokibajahnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bajahnĂŒmusha|bajahnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobajahnknĂŒmusha|gobajahnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibajahnĂŒmusha|gokibajahnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:bajahshĂ«nĂŒsha|bajahshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gobajahnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gobajahnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokibajahshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokibajahshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:bajahshĂ«rosha|bajahshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobajahnkshĂ«rosha|gobajahnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibajahshĂ«rosha|gokibajahshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bajahshĂ«musha|bajahshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobajahnkshĂ«musha|gobajahnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibajahshĂ«musha|gokibajahshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:bajahronĂŒsha|bajahronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gobajahnkronĂŒsha|gobajahnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokibajahronĂŒsha|gokibajahronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:bajahroshĂ«sha|bajahroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gobajahnkroshĂ«sha|gobajahnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokibajahroshĂ«sha|gokibajahroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bajahromusha|bajahromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobajahnkromusha|gobajahnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibajahromusha|gokibajahromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:bajahmunĂŒsha|bajahmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gobajahnkmunĂŒsha|gobajahnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokibajahmunĂŒsha|gokibajahmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:bajahmushĂ«sha|bajahmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gobajahnkmushĂ«sha|gobajahnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokibajahmushĂ«sha|gokibajahmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:bajahmurosha|bajahmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobajahnkmurosha|gobajahnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibajahmurosha|gokibajahmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:bajah|bajah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:bĂŠjĂŠh|bĂŠjĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hobajah|hobajah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hobĂŠjĂŠh|hobĂŠjĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohobajah|hohobajah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohobĂŠjĂŠh|hohobĂŠjĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒbajah|nĂŒbajah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒbĂŠjĂŠh|nĂŒbĂŠjĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒbajah|nĂŒnĂŒbajah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒbĂŠjĂŠh|nĂŒnĂŒbĂŠjĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻbajah|nĂŻbajah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻbĂŠjĂŠh|nĂŻbĂŠjĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻbajah|nĂŻnĂŻbajah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻbĂŠjĂŠh|nĂŻnĂŻbĂŠjĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lubajah|lubajah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lubĂŠjĂŠh|lubĂŠjĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulubajah|lulubajah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulubĂŠjĂŠh|lulubĂŠjĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:libajah|libajah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:libĂŠjĂŠh|libĂŠjĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilibajah|lilibajah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilibĂŠjĂŠh|lilibĂŠjĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kobajah|kobajah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kobĂŠjĂŠh|kobĂŠjĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokobajah|kokobajah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokobĂŠjĂŠh|kokobĂŠjĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kebajah|kebajah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kebĂŠjĂŠh|kebĂŠjĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekebajah|kekebajah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekebĂŠjĂŠh|kekebĂŠjĂŠh]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
